homeowner.name: Inspectly
homeowner.subtitle: Manage Home Inspections
homeowner.description: Inspectly helps homeowners manage property inspections, review vendor offers, schedule site visits, and pay for repairs — all from your phone. Track issues found in inspection reports, receive competitive bids from verified vendors, and monitor project progress in real-time.
homeowner.keywords: home inspection, property management, home repair, vendor marketplace, home maintenance

vendor.name: Inspectly Pro
vendor.subtitle: Find & Manage Repair Jobs
vendor.description: Inspectly Pro connects verified contractors and repair vendors with homeowners who need repairs identified during home inspections. Browse available jobs in the marketplace, submit competitive bids, schedule assessment visits, and manage your active projects — all in one app.
vendor.keywords: contractor, repair jobs, home repair, vendor, bidding, marketplace
